name: Sour Cream Turkey Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of chicken soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 cup Frozen corn, broccoli and red pepper mixture
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish lightly.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine half the can of soup, sour cream, flour, and sliced green onions. Blend well.
4. Cook over medium heat until the mixture is bubbly, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in the diced cooked turkey and frozen vegetable mixture; mix well.
6. Continue cooking over medium heat until the mixture is thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
7. Warm the tortillas according to package instructions.
8. Spoon about 1/4 cup of filling onto each tortilla and roll them up.
9. Place the rolled tortillas on the greased baking dish.
10. In the same saucepan, combine the remaining half can of soup, American cheese, and milk. Cook over medium heat until the cheese is melted, stirring frequently.
11. Pour the mixture evenly over the enchiladas.
12. Cover the baking dish tightly with foil.
13. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes or until bubbly.
14. Top with stuffed green olives and cilantro before serving.
